## Northstar / Lifecycle Impact
- [ ] This PR affects project direction, scope, milestone truth, execution policy, external integrations, or publication framing
- [ ] If yes, I updated one or more:
  - [ ] docs/NORTHSTAR.md
  - [ ] docs/PRD.md
  - [ ] docs/MILESTONES.md
  - [ ] docs/NORTHSTAR_CHANGELOG.md
  - [ ] docs/POST_BRIEF.md
  - [ ] docs/FLIGHT_CONTROL.md
  - [ ] docs/MILESTONE_OUTPUT_SPEC.md
- [ ] If no, I confirm: No Northstar Impact
- [ ] Rationale (required if No Northstar Impact):

## Research checks (when applicable)
- [ ] I reviewed current external facts for fast-moving systems, APIs, vendors, or adjacent tooling touched by this PR
- [ ] If new facts changed scope, terminology, or boundaries, I updated canonical docs before implementation continued

## Strategic + lifecycle checks (when applicable)
- [ ] Core Experience / Center of Gravity preserved
- [ ] Do-not-become constraints preserved
- [ ] Adjacent boundaries preserved
- [ ] Strategic locks preserved or intentionally updated via changelog
- [ ] Canonical terms preserved or intentionally updated
- [ ] Milestone impact evaluated
- [ ] Cross-lane acknowledgement evaluated
- [ ] Execution policy impact evaluated

## Milestone output checks (required for milestone-delivery / publication-change)
- [ ] README.md updated from canonical docs
- [ ] docs/MILESTONES.md updated
- [ ] docs/POST_BRIEF.md updated
- [ ] Discord blurb prepared per docs/MILESTONE_OUTPUT_SPEC.md
- [ ] Twitter/X post prepared per docs/MILESTONE_OUTPUT_SPEC.md

## Evidence (if applicable)
- Metric / test / user feedback / artifact proving impact:

## Reviewer checks
- [ ] Claims are evidence-backed
- [ ] Do-not-claim list respected
- [ ] No hidden lifecycle contradiction
- [ ] No latest-dev-vibe drift
